name: @jetmiky/pigram
description_en: Clean, session-local Telegram bridge for the pi coding agent — chat with pi from your phone with rich text, streaming previews, file attachments, and native inline-keyboard dialogs.
description_zh: pi coding agent 的干净、会话本地的 Telegram 桥接器 — 从您的手机与 pi 聊天，支持富文本、流式预览、文件附件和原生内联键盘对话框。
